name: The Museum Story
focus: Reading comprehension - Field trip to the museum
storyIntro: Let's read about the field trip to the Museum of Natural Science!
storyOutro: You understood the whole story! You're a great reader!

tasks.prompt: Miss Wilson's class went on a field trip. Where did they go?
tasks.hint: They went to see dinosaur bones!

tasks.prompt: How did the class get to the museum?
Put the story events in order.
items: The class got on the bus and sang songs.
They ate lunch in the cafeteria.
tasks.hint: What happened first on the trip?

tasks.prompt: What did the children see in the Dinosaur Gallery?
tasks.hint: Dinosaurs lived long ago. We can only see their...

tasks.prompt: The children were ___ when they saw the big dinosaur.
Who went missing during the field trip?
What funny thing was in the story?
What rule did Miss Wilson remind the students about?
options: Follow the rules and be quiet.
tasks.hint: She wanted them to behave well.

tasks.prompt: Why were the children surprised at the museum?
options: The dinosaur bones were very big.
tasks.hint: The Dinosaur Gallery had something amazing!

tasks.prompt: Put the end of the story in order.
items: She found them at the gift shop.
tasks.hint: First they got lost, then someone found them.
